F(J,{...},S,n)end return N end,function(J)local S,F=928208-928207,J[-575121+575122]while F do v[F],S=v[F]-(-180497-(-180498)),S+(8856-8855)if 738618+-738618==v[F]then v[F],y[F]=nil,nil end F=J[S]end end,function(J,S)local n=u(S)local N=function(N,O,R)return F(J,{N;O,R},S,n)end return N end,function(J,S)local n=u(S)local N=function(N,O,R,B,o)return F(J,{N,O,R,B;o},S,n)end return N end,function(J,S)local n=u(S)local N=function(N,O,R,B,o,y)return F(J,{N;O;R;B;o;y},S,n)end return N end,function(J,S)local n=u(S)local N=function(N,O,R,B,o,y,v)return F(J,{N,O;R,B;o;y;v},S,n)end return N end return(d(105338+19296,{}))(n(o))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[S(204072+-149109)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
